name: Chocolate Zucchini Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Zucchini, peeled and finely shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate over low heat in a small pot. Set aside to cool.
2. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. In a medium bowl, combine the flours, oats, and baking soda. Set aside.
4. Cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
5. Gradually add the eggs, yogurt, vanilla extract, and lemon rind, beating well after each addition.
6. Stir in the shredded zucchini.
7. Add the flour mixture to the butter mixture in two additions, mixing until just combined.
8. Beat in the walnuts and melted chocolate.
9. Pour the batter into a greased 9x5-inch loaf pan.
10. Bake for 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Allow to cool on a wire rack before turning out of the pan. Store overnight for easier slicing or freeze until needed.
Makes 1 loaf.
